title: Written On A Pane Of Glass, In The Inn At Moffat.
content:
Ask why God made the gem so small,
            And why so huge the granite?
        Because God meant mankind should set
            The higher value on it.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "Written On A Pane Of Glass, In The Inn At Moffat."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
